location: On a corpse atop a rock pillar deep inside Highroad Cave, in northern Limgrave, being fed on by Giant Bats.
tactics: From the Saintsbridge grace, drop into the water beneath the bridge and head north to find the unmarked cave entrance in the west cliff wall — bring a torch, it's dark inside
Giant Land Octopi lurk near the entrance in the water; take care crossing that section
Deep inside, Giant Bats swarm the corpse holding the sword atop a tall interior pillar — climbing up while they harass you risks a fall
This is an optional, fairly early-accessible cave, not required for main progression
lore: A curved sword with an unusually long, thin blade that stays light despite its size, letting its wielder chain together quick, successive slicing strikes.

builds.name: Fast Strength/Dexterity poke build
builds.why: Above-average reach for a curved sword combined with quick, rapid-fire slashing attacks suits a build built around whittling down stamina with fast strings.
